title: Bière & Code Paris
description: A welcoming space for developers, engineers, and tech enthusiasts to explore ideas, share knowledge, and connect over great conversation and craft beer.

monthly.title: Monthly Meetups
monthly.description: Every month, we gather for tech talks, project demos, and open networking. Typical format: 6pm arrival, 6:30 lightning talks, 7pm open discussion. Bring your projects, questions, or just your curiosity.

updates.title: Community Updates
updates.description: Event recaps, member spotlights, tech trends, and project showcases. Weekly posts keep you connected to what our community is building and learning together.

community.title: Open to All
community.description: All languages, frameworks, and experience levels welcome. From students to senior engineers, career-switchers to founders—if you're curious about tech, you belong here.

firstTime.title: First Time?
firstTime.subtitle: Here's What to Expect
points: No registration needed—just show up and introduce yourself
All skill levels welcome, from beginners to experts
Relaxed atmosphere: bring projects, questions, or just curiosity
Make friends, find collaborators, or simply enjoy good conversation

learnTogether.title: Learn Together
learnTogether.description: Share knowledge, discuss emerging technologies, and explore diverse perspectives. From debugging sessions to architecture debates, we grow by learning from each other.

relax.title: Relax & Connect
relax.description: Tech doesn't have to be intense. Meet in a casual setting where you can be yourself, build genuine friendships, and find your work-life balance in the community.

network.title: Grow Your Network
network.description: Connect with fellow developers, discover collaboration opportunities, find mentors or mentees. Some of Paris's best tech friendships started over a beer.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Meet the team behind Bière & Code Paris.

raph.bio: Senior Developer Evangelist at Defang and a serial entrepreneur with deep roots in the startup ecosystem. As the founder of Ephemere Creative and Tembo Tech, Raph combines technical expertise with a passion for community building and mentorship, bridging the gap between complex cloud technologies and the developers who use them.

miguel.bio: Senior Software Engineer at Gencove (NYC), specializing in high-scale Cloud Infrastructure and Backend systems for genomic analysis. An active open-source contributor and former digital nomad, Miguel brings a global perspective and strong entrepreneurial background to engineering, having built and launched successful products across multiple platforms.

footer.mission: Building a welcoming tech community in Paris, one beer at a time.

aiOrchestration.title: Bière & Code: AI Orchestration
aiOrchestration.tagline: Master the art of AI workflow automation
aiOrchestration.description: A dedicated community hub for engineers and developers passionate about AI orchestration, workflow automation, and intelligent systems. Learn from industry leaders, collaborate on projects, and shape the future of automated intelligence.
aiOrchestration.coBrandingNote: A specialized initiative by Bière & Code
aiOrchestration.heroCtaDescription: Connect with engineers building the next generation of AI systems

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Master AI orchestration concepts and practices

card1.title: Orchestration Fundamentals
card1.description: Deep dives into workflow orchestration, task scheduling, and distributed systems. Learn how to design scalable, reliable AI pipelines that power modern applications.

card2.title: Industry Tools & Frameworks
card2.description: Hands-on exploration of leading orchestration frameworks: Airflow, Temporal, Prefect, and more. Compare approaches and discover which fits your use case.

card3.title: Real-World Case Studies
card3.description: Learn from practitioners who've built production AI systems. Understand the challenges, solutions, and best practices from the trenches.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: Build relationships with fellow AI engineers

card1.title: Monthly Meetups
card1.description: Join our community every month for talks, demos, and networking. Meet engineers working on AI orchestration, discuss challenges, and collaborate on solutions.

card2.title: Expert Roundtables
card2.description: Intimate discussions with industry leaders and practitioners. Share war stories, learn cutting-edge techniques, and grow your professional network.

card3.title: Online Community
card3.description: 24/7 access to a vibrant Slack community. Ask questions, share resources, celebrate wins, and stay updated on the latest in AI orchestration.

card1.title: Workshop Series
card1.description: Get hands-on with guided workshops. Build your first orchestrated AI pipeline, debug real workflows, and implement production-grade solutions.

card2.title: Project Collaborations
card2.description: Form teams to tackle challenging orchestration problems. Whether it's optimizing pipelines, integrating new tools, or building specialized solutions—collaborate and ship.

card3.title: Showcase Your Work
card3.description: Present your orchestration projects to the community. Get feedback, find collaborators, and inspire others with your implementations.

upcoming.title: Upcoming AI Orchestration Events
upcoming.subtitle: Join us for specialized discussions and hands-on learning

quote1.text: Finally, a community focused on the orchestration layer of AI systems. The insights I've gained have transformed how we build pipelines.
quote1.author: Alex, ML Engineer

quote2.text: Love the balance between learning and doing. These aren't just talks—we're actually building things together.
quote2.author: Jordan, Platform Engineer

quote3.text: The best part is meeting people who understand the real challenges of production AI orchestration. Invaluable network.

faq.q1: What experience level do I need?
faq.a1: All levels welcome! Whether you're new to orchestration or shipping production systems, there's something for you. We have talks ranging from fundamentals to advanced patterns.
faq.a2: We host specialized AI Orchestration meetups monthly, plus bonus workshops and roundtables throughout the quarter. Members also stay connected in our online community.
faq.q3: Do I need to know a specific tool?
faq.a3: No! We cover multiple orchestration frameworks and focus on underlying concepts. You'll learn what makes sense for your tech stack.
faq.a4: Not at all. We welcome individual developers, startups, and enterprises. Our discussions span from personal projects to enterprise systems.
